content:
「秘银日冕」系列徽章盲盒 与 「能登麻美子 亲笔签名」抽奖活动已结束，现公布中奖名单。

🔔 本周五前我们会通过私信联系中奖的守密人，请大家留意后台私信。

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

The lucky lottery for the "Silver Corona" series badge blind box and the Mamiko Noto Autograph has concluded! Congratulations to all the winning Keepers!

🔔 **Next Steps: **
We will be contacting all winners via private message before this Friday. 
Please check your backend messages for details on claiming your prize!

✦ https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1441326394817908736
✦ https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1441670566472978433
✦ https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442825647138406480

thread_title: 中奖名单公布┊Lottery Winners Announced!

content:
⏰️**活动时间： **
在 12 月 15 日 9:00 - 1 月 12 日 9:00 期间，幻衣活动「孽宴狂欲」限时开放。

📌**活动内容：**
✦**「调查行动-忘却篇-第一/二/三/四/五/六章」困难模式：**每完成一章，即可获得「银芯」×300。

✦**「调查行动-忘却篇-第七章」困难模式：**完成即可获得「银芯」×300，泰旖丝全新一星幻衣「孽宴狂欲」。

✦ 活动结束后 一星幻衣「泰旖丝·孽宴狂欲」将会上架「幻衣订购」商城，价格为「源液」×680 。

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

⏰️**Time:**
The "Sinful Decadence" event runs from <t:1765760400:F> to <t:1768179600:F>. Don't miss out!

📌**Details:**
✦**Faded Legacy Chapter 1-6 Hard Mode:** Complete each chapter to receive 300 Silver.

✦**Faded Legacy Chapter 7 Hard Mode: **Complete to receive 300 Silver and New Thais Skin (1★) "Sinful Decadence"!

✦ After the event ends, "Thais: Sinful Decadence" (1★) will be available in the "Garment Ordering" shop for Silver Prime ×680.
